name: Chunky Garden Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine tomato sauce, olive oil, vinegar, and honey.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients until well mixed.
3. Serve chilled with one of the garnishes: herbed garlic croutons, a dollop of plain yogurt topped with finely minced fresh chives, finely shredded lettuce, or minced parsley (optional).
4. Makes 4-6 servings.
VARIATIONS:
Add 2 tablespoons chopped fresh mint leaves; omit hot pepper sauce.
Serve with a substantial salad and/or a cheese platter.
